en_title: Disney's Live-Action Moana Bombs at the Box Office With Opening Weekend That Barely Beats Snow White
cn_title: 迪士尼真人《海洋奇缘》首周末票房惨淡
subtitle: 票房风暴未起
opus_summary: 真人《海洋奇缘》首周末全球票房9,500万美元(约合人民币6.44亿元)，仅略高于《白雪公主》。面对2.5亿美元(约合人民币16.95亿元)预算，迪士尼承压。

paragraphs.en: Disney's live-action Moana movie washed up at the box office with an estimated global total of $95 million on its opening weekend.
paragraphs.cn: 迪士尼真人版《海洋奇缘》首周末票房触礁，全球预计仅收获9,500万美元(约合人民币6亿元)。

paragraphs.en: It's a debut that puts the House of Mouse's latest remake just barely ahead of Snow White , which pulled just $87.3 million during its infamously underwhelming opening weekend in 2025. In other words, things aren't looking good for Moana.
paragraphs.cn: 这一首映成绩仅让迪士尼最新翻拍片勉强超过《白雪公主》；后者在2025年那场声名狼藉的惨淡首周末只收获8,730万美元(约合人民币6亿元)。换句话说，《海洋奇缘》的情况不容乐观。

paragraphs.en: The split puts its domestic haul at an estimated $43 million, with an international pull sitting at $52 million. While that still positions the Moana remake in first for the mid-July weekend, it's almost certainly not the numbers Disney was hoping to see as it continues pushing out live-action adaptations for some of its most beloved stories.
paragraphs.cn: 其中北美票房预计为4,300万美元(约合人民币3亿元)，海外票房为5,200万美元(约合人民币4亿元)。虽然这仍让《海洋奇缘》翻拍版成为7月中旬周末票房冠军，但几乎肯定没有达到迪士尼继续推出经典故事真人改编时所期待的数字。

paragraphs.en: Starring Catherine Laga'aia as its titular princess and Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson, who once again plays Maui, the live-action Moana movie had some high-end projections hoping its opening weekend would bring in $60 million to $65 million domestically and as much as $75 million internationally. As that doesn't seem to come close to panning out, Disney will now face a painful reality with an even softer debut that stacks up against a reported budget of $250 million (via Variety ).
paragraphs.cn: 真人版《海洋奇缘》由Catherine Laga'aia饰演同名公主，Dwayne「巨石」Johnson再次饰演Maui。部分乐观预测曾预计影片首周末北美票房为6,000万至6,500万美元(约合人民币4亿元)，海外票房最高可达7,500万美元(约合人民币5亿元)。如今看来这一目标远未实现，面对据报高达2.5亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)的预算，迪士尼将不得不面对更惨淡的首映现实。

paragraphs.en: When Snow White failed to perform last year, it supposedly resulted in the indefinite delay of the live-action Tangled movie. Although progress on that front was stalled for some time, it has since picked up steam with new additions to the cast following the success of the live-action Lilo and Stitch movie .
paragraphs.cn: 《白雪公主》去年表现不佳后，据称导致真人版《魔发奇缘》无限期延期。虽然该项目一度停滞，但真人版《星际宝贝》成功后，随着新演员加入，项目又重新提速。

paragraphs.en: For now, there's no sign that Disney will course correct again as Moana fails to impress. In the meantime, Variety has reported that Tangled is expected to premiere in 2028. Other remakes in development include live-action Bambi , Hercules , and Lilo and Stitch 2 , as well as a project based on Beauty and the Beast villain, Gaston .
paragraphs.cn: 目前没有迹象表明《海洋奇缘》表现不佳会促使迪士尼再次调整方向。与此同时，Variety报道《魔发奇缘》预计于2028年上映。其他开发中的翻拍片包括真人版《小鹿斑比》《大力士》《星际宝贝2》，以及以《美女与野兽》反派Gaston为主角的项目。

paragraphs.en: In other box office news, Universal Pictures and Lionsgate's Michael Jackson biopic has passed $1 billion globally. It's an update that saw the movie reach an impressive milestone as it became the first biopic in history to reach the mark. Toy Story 5 , meanwhile, is coming up on the same figure, now sitting at $879 million after its fourth weekend in theaters.
paragraphs.cn: 票房方面，环球影业和狮门影业制作的迈克尔·Jackson传记片全球票房已突破10亿美元(约合人民币67.8亿元)。这部电影创下惊人成就，成为历史上首部达到这一数字的传记片。与此同时，《玩具总动员5》也接近这一成绩，院线第四个周末后票房已达8.79亿美元(约合人民币59.7亿元)。

paragraphs.en: The weekend also brought yet another not-so-thrilling update for Supergirl , which now has a total haul of $115.4 million. That puts it still well out of reach from the already disappointing $200 million finish some were hoping for, suggesting significant losses for Warner Bros. and its budding DCU.
paragraphs.cn: 这个周末还带来了《超级少女》的又一条不太令人振奋的消息：影片累计票房目前为1.154亿美元(约合人民币7.83亿元)。这距离部分人原本期待、但已经令人失望的2亿美元(约合人民币13.56亿元)最终成绩仍相去甚远，意味着华纳兄弟及其初生的DCU可能面临重大损失。

paragraphs.en: As the live-action Moana movie attempts to find its sea legs, you can read IGN's 6/10 review . In it, we said, "Dwayne Johnson returns as Maui opposite newcomer Catherine Laga'aia in this frame-by-frame retelling of the Disney animated musical that doesn't do enough to justify being made."
paragraphs.cn: 真人版《海洋奇缘》正在努力站稳脚跟，你可以阅读IGN的6/10评测。我们在评测中写道：「Dwayne Johnson回归饰演Maui，与新人Catherine Laga'aia搭档。这部逐帧重现迪士尼动画音乐剧的作品，并没有做到足以证明自己有必要被制作出来。」
